title: POS Tab Blinking & State Recovery Update
summary: This update adds a live blinking alert system for background tabs needing attention, fixes data loss when switching POS order tabs, and enhances update stability.
highlights: Tab Blinking Notifications: Sidebar and mobile tabs blink dynamically when orders are pending or ingredients are low.
Order Tab Persistence: Cart drafts are correctly saved and recovered during POS tab navigation.
Verification checks: Verified with a full test suite passing all contract tests.
